title: Dora, Best Friends Dora & Boots Set, 15.2-cm Doll with Clothes, Backpack and Boots Toy Figure, Kids Toys for Girls and Boys Ages 3 and Up
features: Adventure-Ready Set: Includes a 15.2-cm Dora the explorer doll with brush-able hair and movable limbs, for sitting or standing poses, along with removable Backpack and shoes for imaginative dress-up play
Amazing BFF's Collection: Dora comes with her BFF Boots, toy figure, a wearable hair slide, and her iconic purple Backpack, that kids can use to enhance their creativity and storytelling skills
Series-Inspired Adventures: Dora and Boots look just like they do in the show, so kids will love watching their favourite episodes alongside their toys, and creating their own amazing explorations
Discover and Collect: Dora the explorer toys are pre-school toys for kids, which include dolls, doll's house accessories, pretend play toys and musical toys, like a toy microphone and kids guitar toy
Toddler Learning Gifts for Kids: These learning toys give the gift of magical creativity, on any occasion, with a gift set of toys for girls, doll clothes, stuffed animals, toy figures and playsets
description: Create magical explorations with the Best Friends Dora & Boots set. This amazing doll and toy figure pack inspires young adventurers to join Dora and her BFF Boots on thrilling escapades. Dora stands 15.2cm-tall and looks just like she does in the show, with soft, rooted hair and movable limbs for dynamic pretend play. Fans of the show will love dressing Dora in her Backpack and shoes, before heading out on adventures. Accompanying her is a Boots toy figure, and Dora's iconic Backpack to wear, for more storytelling possibilities, encouraging creativity and imaginative play. Step into the world of Dora, with toddler toys that will make magical birthday and festive gifts for girls and boys that love pretend play toys, like dolls and accessories and doll's house furniture. For even more thrilling adventures with Dora the explorer, build your very own “World of Dora” with the Rainforest Casita doll house—a casa de munecas that looks just like Dora’s house in the show, and gift packs with lovable action figures and must-have accessories, or interactive dolls, super-cute plushies and pretend play musical instruments that’ll have fans rocking out like the big kids. (each sold separately)
